subject: docs(todo): clarify theme-picker scope — not a one-off
body:
Revised my earlier "1-2h" estimate after reading
scripts/generate-theme-meta.mjs. The meta-color generation regex
captures only the first combo's light/dark theme ids; adding more
combos requires script + index.html changes before a picker makes
sense. The updated entry spells out the full scope so the next session
doesn't pick this up expecting a quick task.

Tags: docs, todo, planning
